CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT lower(name) AS lower_name FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, lower(name) AS lower_name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'H%');
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, description) VALUES (1, 'SOME TEXT'), (2, 'ANOTHER TEXT');
SELECT lower(t.name) AS lower_name, a.description FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.id;
SELECT lower((SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = 2)) AS lower_subquery_name;
SELECT lower(name) FROM (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id > 0) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE special_chars_table (id INTEGER, special_text VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, lower(special_text) AS lower_special FROM special_chars_table;
SELECT lower(t.name) AS lower_name FROM test_table t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM another_table a WHERE a.id = t.id);
SELECT id, lower(name) AS lower_case FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table UNION SELECT id, name FROM another_table) AS combined;
